task_completion.description: The Landsat dataset is loaded into ESA SNAP Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer pane in ESA SNAP shows the loaded dataset, originating from /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif.

task_completion.description: The bands are renamed to SWIR1, NIR, Red, and Green.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer pane under the 'Bands' folder shows the new names (SWIR1, NIR, Red, Green) instead of the original names, or these names are visible in the Band Properties dialog.

task_completion.description: The unit for the bands is set to 'reflectance'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Band Properties dialog or a metadata view shows the 'Unit' field set to 'reflectance' for the bands.

task_completion.description: The No-Data value is set to 0.0 and masking is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Band Properties dialog shows the 'No-Data Value' field set to 0.0 and the 'No-Data Value Used' checkbox is checked for the bands.

task_completion.description: The modified product is saved in BEAM-DIMAP format to the specified export path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/snap_exports/curated_landsat.dim and format BEAM-DIMAP, or the Product Explorer showing the updated saved file path.

integrity.description: The agent used the ESA SNAP Desktop GUI to perform the operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ESA SNAP Desktop interface, including Product Explorer and Band Properties dialogs.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the SNAP GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like gdal_translate, gdal_edit, or python scripts being used to modify the dataset metadata.

integrity.description: The metadata changes were made through the actual application dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made in the SNAP Band Properties dialog, rather than editing a .dim XML file directly in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The expected band names are exactly 'SWIR1', 'NIR', 'Red', and 'Green'. The expected unit is 'reflectance'. The expected No-Data value is 0.0. The output must be saved as /home/ga/snap_exports/curated_landsat.dim in BEAM-DIMAP format.
